title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Saved boards list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Svelte stores holds board cells, saved boards, mode, and palette — shared across components
Implemented with Svelte, Svelte stores, and Tailwind CSS; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist boards or canvas state
Manages the boards collection only in component-local variables rather than Svelte stores
Paint stage + floating toolbar + Gallery density remains a creative tool, not a dashboard
Empty Gallery state is visually present when no boards remain
Shows only a static poster with no paintable grid or gallery collection
Required hover animations are present; paint/gallery switches and toolbar feedback behave as specified
Paint/Gallery mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover feedback on toolbar or gallery rows so the studio feels static on pointer hover
